title: Rolson 61010 Telescopic 2 m Water Fed Wash Brush
features: Heavy Duty Telescopic Water Fed Brush
Aluminium telescopic handle with comfort foam grips and extends to 2.0mtrs
Simple push fit hose connector with on/off switch
Ideal for cars, caravans, conservatories etc
description: From the manufacturer About Rolson Rolson Tools continually look to bring you new innovative products. We have new exciting and innovative products to whet your appetite, together with a host of new in-store packaging and point-of-sale material. All designed with impact and shelf appeal! The Rolson marketing team have sought innovative ways to package our new and existing lines, together with bringing promotional product combinations that offer originality and a unique sales offering. Rolson Water Fed Wash Brush 2m Telescopic Heavy duty telescopic water fed brush aluminium telescopic handle with comfort foam grips and extends to 2m. With 254mm wide angled brush head Simple push fit hose connector with on/off switch Ideal For Cars, Caravans, Conservatories Etc Water Fed Wash Brush
